hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit push\b'; then python3 ./scripts/check_alembic_heads.py; fi

hooks.prompt: Look at the bash command being run: $TOOL_INPUT. If it does NOT contain 'git push', output nothing and allow it. If it DOES contain 'git push', inspect the current conversation and answer: were at least TWO separate Agent tool calls made in this conversation since the last git push, specifically as pre-deploy review agents (codebase audit + UX/end-user perspective), and were their results read and addressed before this push attempt? If yes, allow the push. If no — even if one agent ran but not two, or the agents ran but findings were not addressed — output exactly: {"continue": false, "stopReason": "BLOCKED: Pre-deploy agent review incomplete. Per CLAUDE.md, you must spawn at least two parallel agents (codebase audit + UX/end-user perspective) and address their findings BEFORE every push. Run both agents now, review results, fix any issues, then push."}
hooks.statusMessage: Verifying pre-deploy agent review was completed...

hooks.prompt:
You are a senior engineer doing a pre-push code review for the Ad Builder app (BHM-Dev/iscale-facebook-ad-builder). Review the staged diff by running: cd /Users/sunbunzz/Desktop/iscale-facebook-ad-builder && git diff HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --cached. Check for these 8 failure classes:
1. ALEMBIC: Any new migration file whose down_revision does not point to the current single head (run python3 scripts/check_alembic_heads.py)
2. MODEL/MIGRATION MISMATCH: New SQLAlchemy column added to models.py without a corresponding migration file
3. REACT AUTO-ADVANCE LOOP: useEffect that calls setCurrentStep without a skipAutoAdvance guard — Back button will loop
4. ADSET vs CAMPAIGN KEY: Any state or API call keyed on campaign_id when it should be adset.id (brand assignment, remix state)
5. META CDN URL: Any call to deconstruct_template or fetch of a Meta image URL without a try/except fallback to the generic blueprint
6. LOCALSTORAGE HANDOFF: pendingRemixCreative or pendingBatchCopy written but not read (or vice versa) — broken wizard handoff
7. JOEL UX REGRESSION: Any change to AdRemix.jsx wizard step order, CampaignPerformance.jsx Remix drawer, or BatchGenerate.jsx pre-fill that could break Joel's daily workflow
8. KIE.AI CONTRACT DRIFT: Any change to generated_ads.py that modifies the kie.ai endpoint URL, model name, payload field names, poll field names, or image URL extraction. If found, BLOCK the push with: 'KIE.AI CHANGE DETECTED: You must run GET https://adbuilder-api.velocitymx.io/api/v1/generated-ads/test-kie and confirm both tests return code 200 + taskId BEFORE pushing. The verified contract is: POST /flux/kontext/generate, model=flux-kontext-pro, camelCase schema, poll at /flux/kontext/record-info, successFlag integer, resultImageUrl. Do not push until the live test confirms it.'
If any issues found: output JSON {"continue": false, "stopReason": "PRE-PUSH REVIEW BLOCKED:\n[issue list]"}
If clean: output nothing and exit 0.

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "A git push just completed. Post a release summary of what was shipped to the media-buys Slack channel (C08G7PJJ6NB) using the slack send message tool. Keep it concise: feature name, what it does for Joel, any action needed."}}'
